name: Raspberry Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Toss the raspberries with 2 tablespoons of the sugar and the raspberry liqueur if desired. Let sit for 10 minutes.
3. Beat the eggs in a large bowl. Whisk in the salt and 1/2 cup of the sugar until just blended.
4. Sift the flour into the bowl, whisking it into the mixture just blended.
5. Butter 6 individual gratin dishes. Divide the raspberries among them. Divide the egg mixture among the dishes. Sprinkle with the remaining 2 tablespoons sugar.
6. Place on a cookie sheet in the oven. Cook for 15 minutes, or until the top has just begun to harden and the center is still creamy. Pass under the broiler for a moment to brown. Serve immediately.
Suggested wines: New York Finger Lakes Riesling; Sauternes; and/or Muscat de Beaumes-de-Venise
Yield: 6 servings
